scope: March-April issued 1D and 7D action sheets with matured outcomes only
key_findings: Execution gaps were a real issue on 1D sheets; fill feasibility must be tracked separately from ranking quality.
Several misses still showed strong max intraday/upside tails but poor close conversion, which supports anti-chase filtering for same-day books.
Weekly baskets were more robust than 1D books on close-to-close outcomes, but overextended names remained a source of weaker median returns.
